headline: Is Hershey (HSY) Still Attractive After Mixed Returns And High P/E Ratio?
summary: If you are wondering whether Hershey's current share price still offers value, it helps to step back and look at what the recent numbers and news are really implying about the stock. Hershey shares last closed at US$184.58, with returns over the past week down 4.9%, roughly flat over 30 days with a 1.0% decline, up 1.2% year to date, up 17.5% over 1 year, down 21.3% over 3 years, and up 19.4% over 5 years. This is a mixed picture that often raises fresh questions about future upside and...
